## Bug Report: [Title]

**Severity:** P1 (Critical - Production down) / P2 (High - Major feature broken) / P3 (Medium - Minor issue) / P4 (Low - Cosmetic)

---

Clear and concise description of the bug.

---

2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

---
